region.bioregion: Northeastern Pennsylvania · Pocono Plateau · Delaware River Highlands

labels.soilMoisture: Elevated in ravines; ridge tops drying

whatChangedThisWeek: Two warm days dried south-facing ridge litter faster than north slopes.
Valley fog and light rain kept river terraces moist — morel window closing but not gone below 1,200 ft.
Oak litter on mid-elevation north slopes holding moisture — early signal for summer chanterelles, not fruiting yet.
Blueberry flower clusters visible on sunny edges; fruit weeks away.
